description: Fragment of a business letter in Judaeo-Arabic and some Hebrew. Dating: probably 11th or 12th century. Refers to many losses over the last two years. The sender asks that the addressee look into selling coral for him. Mentions someone who needed a loan/advance.
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
